question: WHat are the first and last names, and middle initials of all customers who did not make any orders?
sql: SELECT customer_first_name, customer_middle_initial, customer_last_name FROM Customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Orders);

back_translation.intent: 查找未下单的顾客信息
filters: customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Orders)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确反映了原始问题的意图，即查找未下单的顾客的姓名信息，且正确使用了过滤条件和涉及的表与列。
